name: 冷宮創業（日常治癒）
description: 女主們在冷宮中製作毛線玩偶、刺繡、烹飪的日常場景，溫馨且充滿生活氣息，是緊張宮鬥劇情中的治癒調劑。
tags: 被遺棄的女性用雙手創造美好生活的勵志畫面

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Look at this little rabbit. Not only do children like it, even an old woman like me loves it... Exactly. From now on, we will dress up and look gorgeous everyday. Not for others, but just so we can feel better about ourselves.
examples.context: 被遺棄的女性用雙手創造美好生活的勵志畫面
